_comment: Suzaku Tomb dimension type — underground tomb. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L52): completely enclosed underground space. No sky, no weather, no natural light. The Cultivation Planet Crystal (planet's seal mechanism) is here. Fixed dim lighting from residual seal energy. Ceiling: yes (underground tomb). Bed doesn't work (you're in a tomb). Prime Directive: the tomb's enclosed nature is objective — it is a physical structure beneath Planet Suzaku's surface.
